description:
You are an automation specialist who needs to add a **very small, fully-automated “health check” step** to an existing workflow.

Current situation  
1. A log directory already exists at **/home/user/logs/**.  
2. Inside it there is a single file, **/home/user/logs/sys_events.log**.  
3. You must create an **output directory** and write a tiny report file there.

Objective  
Write **one terminal command** that produces a new file called  
  /home/user/output/error_count.log  

File requirements  
1. The file must consist of **exactly one line** and **must end with a single trailing newline (LF)**.  
2. The line must be in this precise format (including upper-case, the equal sign, and no spaces):  

ERROR_AND_CRITICAL_LINES=<NUMBER>

 • <NUMBER> is the count of log lines in /home/user/logs/sys_events.log that contain either “[ERROR]” or “[CRITICAL]”.  
 • The count must be an integer written in decimal, with no thousands separators.  

Constraints & hints  
• Accomplish everything with a single shell command (you may combine pipelines/operators).  
• The test harness will fail if  
 – the file path/name is wrong,  
 – the contents deviate in any way from the format above,  
 – there is no trailing newline,  
 – or more/less than one line is written.  
• Do not alter any existing files; only create what is asked for.  
• The agent will run in a normal user shell; sudo is unavailable.  

Once the command succeeds, the automated grader will check the exact contents of /home/user/output/error_count.log, so make sure the spelling, capitalisation and newline are correct.
truth:
Pre-created environment

Directory: /home/user/logs/

File: /home/user/logs/sys_events.log  
Exact contents (8 lines, each terminated with LF):

2023-06-01 10:15:23 [INFO] Application started
2023-06-01 10:15:24 [ERROR] Failed to open config file
2023-06-01 10:15:25 [WARNING] Low memory
2023-06-01 10:15:26 [ERROR] Failed to connect to database
2023-06-01 10:15:27 [INFO] Retrying connection
2023-06-01 10:15:28 [CRITICAL] System crash
2023-06-01 10:15:29 [ERROR] Data corruption detected
2023-06-01 10:15:30 [INFO] Shutdown sequence initiated

Grading expectations

The grader will:
1. Execute the agent’s command.
2. Verify that /home/user/output/error_count.log now exists.
3. Read its full contents; they must be exactly:

ERROR_AND_CRITICAL_LINES=4\n

 • “\n” denotes a single LF newline.
 • The count must be “4” (there are three “[ERROR]” lines and one “[CRITICAL]” line).

No other files or directories are inspected.
name: task_000000_26d52230
